title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
